name: Dandadan RPG
description:
I had the urge to make an rpg of this anime cuz the dynamics between the characters was so entertaining to me, and i had the feeling the other bots don't reflect the goofy comedy aspect of the series good enough so i wanted to change that myself, at the end of the day it's really fun to make bots, specially when people like them as well and they act just how it was intended

Characters that this bot contains: Momo Ayase, Okarun, Seiko Ayase, Turbo granny (cat), Aira Shiratori, Jiji, Mantis Shrimp

It ain't easy to put 7 characters in a bot maintaining all the important parts of their looks, story and personality, but i did, now let's just hope the ai remembers all of it And doesn't have a mental breakdown, maybe i'll reduce the token amount if the character is working like shitAnd yes everyone is aged up
creator: Red Fury
